category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Armenia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入亚美尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入亞美尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Armenia SARM and EAEU TR CU / EAC conformity requirements, PSRC and ENA grid-connection coordination, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, EMC requirements including IEC 61000 and TR CU 020/2011, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与亚美尼亚SARM及EAEU TR CU / EAC合格评定要求、PSRC和ENA并网协调、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、包括IEC 61000及TR CU 020/2011在内的EMC要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與亞美尼亞SARM及EAEU TR CU / EAC合格評定要求、PSRC和ENA併網協調、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、包括IEC 61000及TR CU 020/2011在內的EMC要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Armenia, the confirmed practical gaps are EAEU Technical Regulation and EAC conformity for in-scope products, IEC-family EVSE safety evidence, connector conversion from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, PSRC / ENA coordination for grid-connected installations, EMC evidence under IEC 61000 and TR CU 020/2011, and OCPP or project-specific back-office interoperability for networked chargers. Armenia is an EAEU member, so TR CU 004/2011 for low-voltage equipment, TR CU 020/2011 for EMC, and the EAC mark are a genuine pathway for in-scope EV charging equipment. This is materially different from non-EAEU markets where EAC does not apply. Armenia's grid is commonly treated as 220/380 V, 50 Hz, which is close to China's nominal 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, but Chinese domestic GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector conformity, and GB/T 27930 communication evidence are not accepted as substitutes for EAEU / SARM conformity, IEC connector compatibility, or PSRC / ENA project acceptance.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入亚美尼亚时，已确认的实务差距包括：范围内产品的EAEU技术法规及EAC合格评定、IEC体系EVSE安全证据、接口从GB/T 20234改为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2、并网安装须与PSRC / ENA协调、依据IEC 61000和TR CU 020/2011准备EMC证据，以及联网充电桩的OCPP或项目专属后台互操作。亚美尼亚是EAEU成员国，因此TR CU 004/2011低压设备、TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容和EAC标志对范围内充电设备是真实可用的路径。这与EAC不适用的非EAEU市场有实质差异。亚美尼亚电网通常按220/380 V、50 Hz处理，与中国220/380 V、50 Hz标称基线接近，但中国国内GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口符合性和GB/T 27930通信证据，不能替代EAEU / SARM合格评定、IEC接口兼容性或PSRC / ENA项目验收。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入亞美尼亞時，已確認的實務差距包括：範圍內產品的EAEU技術法規及EAC合格評定、IEC體系EVSE安全證據、接口從GB/T 20234改為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2、併網安裝須與PSRC / ENA協調、依據IEC 61000和TR CU 020/2011準備EMC證據，以及聯網充電樁的OCPP或項目專屬後台互操作。亞美尼亞是EAEU成員國，因此TR CU 004/2011低壓設備、TR CU 020/2011電磁相容和EAC標誌對範圍內充電設備是真實可用的路徑。這與EAC不適用的非EAEU市場有實質差異。亞美尼亞電網通常按220/380 V、50 Hz處理，與中國220/380 V、50 Hz標稱基線接近，但中國國內GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口符合性和GB/T 27930通訊證據，不能替代EAEU / SARM合格評定、IEC接口兼容性或PSRC / ENA項目驗收。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SARM or EAEU Technical Regulation scope determination, EAC certificate, PSRC grid-connection approval, ENA interconnection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Armenia SARM standards adoption, applicable EAEU Technical Regulations (TR CU / TR EAEU), PSRC requirements, ENA interconnection conditions, IEC standard editions, and project-owner specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SARM或EAEU技术法规适用范围裁定、EAC证书、PSRC并网批准、ENA电网接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行亚美尼亚SARM标准采纳情况、适用EAEU技术法规（TR CU / TR EAEU）、PSRC要求、ENA接入条件、IEC标准版本及项目业主规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SARM或EAEU技術法規適用範圍裁定、EAC證書、PSRC併網批准、ENA電網接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行亞美尼亞SARM標準採納情況、適用EAEU技術法規（TR CU / TR EAEU）、PSRC要求、ENA接入條件、IEC標準版本及項目業主規格。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
